tests.name: buildSymbolsExportData builds a compact symbol export from per-file analysis results
buildSymbolsExportData sorts relations by normalized file and symbol identity fields
buildSymbolsExportData sorts files and exported symbols by file path instead of map insertion order
buildSymbolsExportDataFromSnapshot uses the structured snapshot symbol and relation tables when per-file analysis fields are missing
buildSymbolsExportDataFromSnapshot normalizes mixed absolute and relative snapshot paths into per-file counts and export rows
buildSymbolsExportDataFromSnapshot counts both incoming and outgoing relations for each file summary entry
buildSymbolsExportDataFromSnapshot emits a compact json shape without duplicate node data
buildSymbolsExportDataFromSnapshot sorts snapshot relations by normalized file and symbol identity fields
extension/export/symbols/build/paths sorts file-backed items by file path without mutating the input array
extension/export/symbols/build/paths resolves exact export file paths after normalizing path separators
extension/export/symbols/build/paths prefers an exact export-path match over a suffix-only candidate
extension/export/symbols/build/paths resolves nested absolute paths to the exported path suffix and falls back to normalized paths
extension/export/symbols/build/relations builds stable relation sort keys from file and symbol coordinates
extension/export/symbols/build/relations sorts relations by their normalized keys without mutating the input
extension/export/symbols/build/relations normalizes relation file paths and preserves missing destinations
export common returns the message from Error instances
export common stringifies non-Error values
export common decodes base64 export data after validating the prefix
export common throws when the export data url prefix is unexpected
export common uses the first workspace folder to seed the save dialog and opens the saved file when requested
export common falls back to a plain file uri when no workspace folder exists
export common falls back to a plain file uri when the workspace folder list is empty
export common does nothing after the save dialog is cancelled
export common reveals the saved file in the OS when the folder action is selected
export common does not run a command when the success action is unrecognized
markdown passes the markdown buffer and export options to the common save flow
markdown encodes markdown content as utf-8 before delegating to the common save flow
markdown uses a timestamped markdown filename when none is provided
markdown shows an export error when the common save flow throws
pluginSave passes string content through the shared save flow as utf-8
pluginSave uses filename-derived defaults when explicit options are omitted
pluginSave falls back to an all-files filter when the filename has no extension
pluginSave shows an error when the shared save flow throws
symbol export save passes symbol json through the shared save flow as utf-8
symbol export save uses the default codegraphy filename when one is not provided
symbol export save shows an error when the shared save flow throws
png decodes png export data and forwards the save options
png uses a timestamped png filename when none is provided
png shows an export error when png export fails
svg passes the svg buffer and export options to the common save flow
svg encodes svg content as utf-8 before delegating to the common save flow
svg uses a timestamped svg filename when none is provided
svg shows an export error when the common save flow throws
json passes the json buffer and export options to the common save flow
json encodes json content as utf-8 before delegating to the common save flow
json uses a timestamped json filename when none is provided
json shows an export error when the common save flow throws
jpeg decodes jpeg export data and forwards the save options
jpeg uses a timestamped jpeg filename when none is provided
jpeg shows an export error when jpeg export fails
extension/export/symbols/build/counts counts symbols by file path
extension/export/symbols/build/counts counts relations for both files only when the target file differs
extension/export/symbols/build/counts creates file entries with zero counts when a file has no symbols or relations
